metadata.authorAffiliations: Institute of Epidemiology, Disease Control and Research (IEDCR)
metadata.authors: Nasif, Md. Abdullah Omar; Alam, Ahmed Nawsher; Jony, Manjur Hossain Khan; Bhuiyan, Maruf Ahmed; Sultana, Sharmin; Hossen, Awlad; Karmakar, Laxman; Shirin, Tahmina
metadata.sequencingProtocol: Whole genome of the Dengue viurs was amplified with 400 bp amplicon scheme described by Vogels et. al (access the primer scheme here: https://dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.kqdg39xxeg25/v3). Library was constructed using the Ligation Sequencing Kit (SQK-LSK114) and barcoded with Native Barcoding Kit (SQK-NBD114.96) following the ARTIC LoCost Protocol (Access the protocol here: https://dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.5jyl885p7l2w/v1).
